hero.title: Proactive Mental Health Support for Nepal
hero.subtitle: A mobile decision-support tool for community health workers to identify early warning signs and connect households with care.

problem.title: The Challenge
problem.description: In Nepal, mental health struggles are often detected late—only after crisis. Community health workers visit households regularly but have no structured tool to record warning signs and escalate concerns early.
problem.stat2Label: Receive no treatment in low-income countries

step1.title: Visit
step1.description: CHWs conduct regular home visits and observe behavioral signals

step2.title: Screen
step2.description: Record 12 evidence-based warning signs using a simple mobile form

step3.title: Flag
step3.description: AI-powered risk scoring identifies households needing follow-up

feature1.title: 12-Signal Screening
feature1.description: WHO mhGAP-aligned behavioral indicators for early detection

feature2.title: AI Risk Scoring
feature2.description: Intelligent risk assessment with plain-language explanations

feature3.title: Bilingual Support
feature3.description: Full English and Nepali language support

feature4.title: Supervisor Dashboard
feature4.description: Area-level risk visualization and case management

cta.title: Ready to make a difference?
cta.description: Join community health workers across Nepal in early mental health screening.

disclaimer.title: Important Notice
disclaimer.text: Saveika is a decision-support tool. It does not diagnose mental health conditions. All data is used to support community health screening only.

trauma.label: Recent loss or trauma
trauma.description: Experienced recent loss or traumatic event

activities.label: Stopped daily activities
activities.description: No longer engaging in routine activities

fear_flashbacks.label: Visible fear, flashbacks, or extreme startle response
fear_flashbacks.description: Observable fear, flashbacks, or exaggerated startle response

psychosis_signs.label: Talking to self, strange beliefs, or confused speech

substance.label: Alcohol/substance use increase
substance.description: Increased use of alcohol or substances

substance_neglect.label: Neglecting family due to substance use
substance_neglect.description: Substance use affecting care for family responsibilities

wish_to_die.label: Expressed wish to die or not exist
wish_to_die.description: Verbalized a wish to die or not continue living
